13.1.2 Top-20 titles for “Language material” content type
In the Fennica dataset, language material makes up the majority of the content, comprising 91.6% of the entire dataset. This includes written texts, documents, books, articles, and any other content primarily composed of language. The remaining 8.4% consists of non-language material, such as maps, music, computer files, and other types of content that do not primarily rely on language. For a more detailed breakdown of the different types of content within the dataset, you can refer to [summaries of type of records in Fennica].

title: 5  Physical dimensions
text:
5.2 Document size comparisons

Some dimension info is provided in the original raw data for altogether 874444 documents (66.3%) but could not be interpreted for 6081 documents, i.e. dimension info was successfully estimated for 99.3% of the documents where this field was not empty.
Document size (area) info was obtained in the final preprocessed data for altogether 868363 documents (65.9%). For the remaining 449693 documents, critical dimension information was not available or could not be interpreted: List of entries where document surface could not be estimated
Document gatherings info is originally available for 109795 documents (8.3%), and further estimated up to 420656 documents (31.9%) in the final preprocessed data.
Document height info is originally available for 758996 documents (57.6%), and further estimated up to 868363 documents (65.9%) in the final preprocessed data.
Document width info is originally available for 79753 documents (6.1%), and further estimated up to 868363 documents (65.9%) in the final preprocessed data.
